content: Hello! How can I help you today?

I can read, write, and edit files, execute shell commands, search the web, send messages to users, spawn subagents for complex tasks, and use a two-layer memory system. I also have access to several skills, including those for managing skills from ClawHub, summarizing content, getting the weather, and scheduling reminders. Would you like me to elaborate on any of these?
search for a ping skill on clawhub
I found one skill on ClawHub called "ping-me". It seems to be named "Ping Me". Would you like me to get more information about it or install it?
